Package com.irurueta.statistics

This package contains utility methods to generate pseudo random numbers having uniform or Gaussian distributions. The implementations in this package help to generate values having a given range, mean, standard deviation, etc. Classes on this package can also work with some popular random variable distributions.
  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    NormalDist.DerivativeEvaluator
    Interface to evaluate a one dimensional function at point x and to obtain its derivative at such point.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    BuildInfo
    Contains build data of this library.
    ChiSqDist
    Contains methods to work with Chi squared distributions.
    Erf
    Defines the error function and methods related to it.
    Gamma
    Defines the gamma function, which is a function that extends the concept of factorials from natural to real and complex numbers (except cero and negative integer values).
    GaussianRandomizer
    Generates pseudo-random values following a Gaussian distribution having the specified mMean and standard deviation.
    GaussLegendreQuadrature
    Defines constants for Gauss-Legendre quadrature.
    NormalDist
    Contains methods to work with normal (i.e.
    Randomizer
    Parent class of all Randomizers.
    UniformRandomizer
    Generates pseudo-random values following a uniform distribution.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    RandomizerType
    Indicates type of Randomizer.
  • Exception Summary 
    Exception Description
    MaxIterationsExceededException
    Exception thrown when maximum number of iterations is exceeded.
    StatisticsException
    Base exception for com.irurueta.statistics package.
